hero.title: Your accountant in your pocket
hero.subtitle: Manage your finances from your phone. Track expenses, create invoices, and report to SUNAT from anywhere.

appPreview.title: See how easy it is
appPreview.subtitle: A simple and intuitive interface designed so you can control your finances in seconds

features.title: Everything you need on your phone

camera.title: Scan Receipts
camera.desc: Use your camera to capture expenses and automatically convert receipts into data.

gps.title: Automatic Location
gps.desc: GPS records where you spend for precise location-based tracking.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.desc: Record operations offline. It syncs when you have connection.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.desc: Get reminders for payments, filings, and deadlines on time.

invoicing.title: Mobile Invoicing
invoicing.desc: Create and send electronic invoices directly from your phone.

reports.title: SUNAT Reports
reports.desc: Generate and file your tax returns from the app.

download.title: Take your accountant with you
download.subtitle: Download the app and take control of your finances

comparison.title: Compare and decide
comparison.subtitle: Forget traditional methods. The app gives you more flexibility.

expense.label: Record expense
expense.traditional: Write down then enter in system

1.quote: Now I log my expenses at the exact moment. I forgot about losing receipts.
1.name: Carlos Mendoza

2.quote: Being able to make invoices from my phone changed everything. I work from anywhere.
2.name: Ana García

3.quote: The camera to scan receipts is the best. It saves me hours every week.
3.name: Luis Torres

1.question: Is the app free to download?
1.answer: Yes, the app is free to download. You can start using it at no cost with basic features available.

2.question: Does it work without internet?
2.answer: Yes, the app works offline. Your data automatically syncs when you have connection again.

3.question: Is it compatible with SUNAT?
3.answer: Absolutely. The app is designed to comply with all SUNAT regulations for electronic invoicing.

4.question: What if I lose my phone?
4.answer: Your data is in the cloud. Just log in to your new device and it will all be there. You won't lose anything.

contact.title: Have questions?
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Contact us and we'll get back to you shortly.

security.title: Guaranteed security
security.desc: Your data protected with bank-level encryption and automatic cloud backup.

time.title: Save time
time.desc: Automate expense logging. Focus on growing your business.

support.title: Specialized support
support.desc: Team of experts ready to help you when you need it.

compliance.title: 100% SUNAT compliant
compliance.desc: Stay up to date with tax regulations without worrying.
